zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Wood於1702年2月6日出生在美國羅得島紐波特蕾托 康普頓時，她的父親Thomas Wood37歲，母親Content Thurston34歲。她於1723年2月7日與Jonathan Sisson在美國羅得島紐波特蕾托 康普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1751年3月14日在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托達特姆斯享年49歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Wood于1702年2月6日出生在美国罗德岛州紐波特蕾托 康普頓时，她的父亲Thomas Wood37岁，母亲Content Thurston34岁。她于1723年2月7日与Jonathan Sisson在美国罗德岛州紐波特蕾托 康普頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1751年3月14日在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托達特姆斯享年49岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

variants.name: Woode
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Woods
meanings: English: variant of Wood with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish: adopted as a translation of Ó Cuill ‘descendant of Coll’ (see Quill ), or in Ulster of Mac Con Coille ‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’, which has also been mistranslated Cox , as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.description: The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Wood was born on 6 February 1702, in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, United States, her father, Thomas Wood, was 37 and her mother, Content Thurston, was 34. She married Jonathan Sisson on 7 February 1723, in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 14 March 1751, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 49, and was buried in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Wood est née le 6 février 1702, à Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis, son père, Thomas Wood, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Content Thurston, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Jonathan Sisson le 7 février 1723, à Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 14 mars 1751, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Wood am 6. Februar 1702 in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wood 37 und ihre Mutter Content Thurston 34. Sie hat am 7. Februar 1723 in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten Jonathan Sisson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 14. März 1751 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Wood è nata il il 6 febbraio 1702 nel Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Thomas Wood, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Content Thurston, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Jonathan Sisson il 7 febbraio 1723, nel Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 14 marzo 1751, nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Woodが1702年2月6日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトリットル コンプトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Woodは37歳，母Content Thurstonは34歳であった。1723年2月7日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトリットル コンプトンでJonathan Sissonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1751年3月14日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルダルトモウスで49歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스

ko.Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, U: 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Wood(이)가 1702년 2월 6일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wood(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Content Thurston(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1723년 2월 7일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴에서 Jonathan Sisson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1751년 3월 14일 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Wood nasceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1702, em Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Thomas Wood, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Content Thurston, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Jonathan Sisson em 7 de fevereiro de 1723, em Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 14 de março de 1751, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Wood родилась 6 февраля 1702 г. в местности литл комптон, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Thomas Wood было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Content Thurston, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jonathan Sisson 7 февраля 1723 г. в местности литл комптон, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 14 марта 1751 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Wood nació el 6 de febrero de 1702, en Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, su papá, Thomas Wood, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Content Thurston, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Jonathan Sisson el 7 de febrero de 1723, en Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 14 de marzo de 1751, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
